name: @swtd-studio/compliance-core
description: SWTD-Studio Compliance Core — deterministic Amazon listing compliance engine. Pure JS, zero Electron / React imports. Loads versioned JSON rule packs, evaluates typed subjects (briefs, prompts, image metadata, export bundles), returns PASS / WARN / BLOCK verdicts. Peer subsystem to provider-core; never fetches the web at runtime.
